feedback.text: Hello, When someone buys a digital product, he hopes to have this product forever that there is no expiry date. This isn't the case with videogames where the games get delisted and consumers lose access to it once support for it ends, this isn't fair and should definetly be regulated with more strict rules and accountability from the gaming publishers. Publishers often say they care for their players and their community, so they shouldn't have a problem reaffirming that stance.
